evals.prompt: We're launching a new AI-powered writing assistant for e-commerce product descriptions in 6 weeks. We have a small team (4 people) and $10K marketing budget. We have 200 people on a waitlist. How do we plan this launch?
evals.expected_output: 6-week launch plan with phased timeline, channel strategy, budget allocation, launch day checklist, and post-launch momentum plan.
assertions: Includes pre-launch phase (waitlist activation, teaser content, beta program)
Covers launch day execution (timing, channels, team roles)
Addresses post-launch momentum (follow-up content, press, reviews)
Allocates the $10K budget across channels with rationale

evals.prompt: Should we launch on Product Hunt?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of Product Hunt launch suitability for the product, with guidance on how to maximize a PH launch if pursuing it, and alternatives if not.
assertions: Assesses Product Hunt fit based on product type
Explains what makes a successful PH launch
Gives a clear recommendation on whether to pursue
Provides alternatives if PH isn't the right fit

evals.prompt: Write the press release for our launch
evals.expected_output: Offers launch strategy input on press release timing and distribution, redirects to copywriting skill for the actual press release writing.
assertions: Offers launch strategy input (timing, embargo, distribution)
Redirects to copywriting skill for the actual press release
